results.definition_en: A square or oblong container with sides and a top.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 盒子、箱子;有蓋的方形或長方形容器。
results.example_en: Put the toys in the box.

results.definition_en: A young male child.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 男孩;年幼的男性。
results.example_en: The boy ran into the garden.

results.definition_en: The soft grey thing inside the head, used for thinking.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 腦、腦髓;頭內柔軟灰色、負責思考之物。
results.example_en: Use your brain to solve the problem.

results.definition_en: A part of a car or bike used to stop it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 煞車;用以使車輛停止的裝置。
results.example_en: Put your foot on the brake.

results.definition_en: A part of a tree that grows out from the main stem.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 樹枝;自樹幹延伸出來的部分。
results.example_en: The bird sat on a high branch.

results.definition_en: A hard block of baked earth, used to build walls.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 磚塊;烘乾的硬土塊，用於築牆。
results.example_en: The house is made of red brick.

results.definition_en: A way built over a river or road, so people can go across.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 橋;跨越河流或道路的通道。
results.example_en: Cross the bridge to get to the town.

results.definition_en: A tool with stiff hairs, used to clean, paint, or do the hair.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 刷子;具硬毛、用以清潔、塗刷或梳髮的工具。
results.example_en: Use a brush to clean the floor.

results.definition_en: A round container with a handle, used to carry water.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 水桶;圓形帶把、用以盛水之容器。
results.example_en: Fill the bucket with water.

results.definition_en: A round part of a plant that grows under the earth; or a round glass thing that gives light.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 球莖;或燈泡。
results.example_en: Change the bulb in the lamp.

results.definition_en: A small round thing on clothes to keep them together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鈕扣;衣物上的小圓物，用以扣合。
results.example_en: Sew on the button that came off.
results.example_zh_tw: 把掉下來的鈕扣縫回去。

results.definition_en: A sweet food made of flour, sugar, and eggs, often baked.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蛋糕;以麵粉、糖、蛋烘焙而成的甜食。
results.example_en: She made a chocolate cake for me.
results.example_zh_tw: 她為我做了個巧克力蛋糕。

results.definition_en: A small box used to take pictures.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 相機;用以拍攝照片的小型器械。
results.example_en: Bring your camera to the party.

results.definition_en: A small flat piece of stiff paper, with words or pictures on it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 卡片;硬挺的小張紙，上有文字或圖案。
results.example_en: Send me a card on my birthday.

results.definition_en: A small thing with wheels used to carry things, often pulled by hand or by an animal.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 推車;帶輪可載物的小型工具，常由人或動物拉動。
results.example_en: Put your goods on the cart.

results.definition_en: A vehicle on wheels, often pulled by a horse, used to take people.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 馬車;多由馬拉動、載人的有輪車輛。
results.example_en: She came to the door in a carriage.

results.definition_en: A small furry animal that is often kept as a pet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 貓;常作寵物的毛皮小動物。
results.example_en: The cat is on the chair.

results.definition_en: A line of metal rings joined together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鏈條;金屬環相連而成的長條。
results.example_en: The dog has a chain round its neck.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻狗脖子上有條鏈子。

results.definition_en: A solid food made from milk, often yellow or white.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 起司、乳酪;以牛奶製成的固體食物，多為黃或白色。
results.example_en: Put some cheese on the bread.

results.definition_en: The front part of the body between the neck and the stomach; or a big strong box.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 胸部;或大型堅固箱櫃。
results.example_en: She put a hand on her chest.

results.definition_en: The part of the face below the mouth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 下巴;嘴下方的臉部部位。
results.example_en: He has a small cut on his chin.

results.definition_en: A building where people go to take part in their religion.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 教堂;信徒進行宗教活動的建築。
results.example_en: We go to church every Sunday.

results.definition_en: A round shape with one curve and no straight lines.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 圓形;單一弧線、無直線的形狀。
results.example_en: Draw a circle on the paper.

results.definition_en: A thing used to show what time it is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鐘;用以顯示時間的裝置。
results.example_en: The clock on the wall says nine.

results.definition_en: A white or grey mass of small water drops in the sky.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 雲;天空中由小水滴匯成的白或灰色團。
results.example_en: A big dark cloud is in the sky.
